name: Mansion #18
description: Al-Qalb, 'The Heart,' ruled by Venus in her darker aspect, stirs up hidden emotions and reveals secret animosities. While challenging, it can be used to expose deception and reveal true intentions. Antares, the rival of Mars and one of the Four Royal Stars, marks the heart of the Scorpion with passionate intensity. The generative artwork renders Antares' deep red light in Venus' shadowy rose palette, with penetrating geometric patterns that pierce veils and reveal hidden truths.

attributes.value: Exposing deception, revealing secrets, uncovering plots
